links.title: Valot
links.tooltip: View light switch status by floor

targets.query:
from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "hotwater_temp")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "supply_temp")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "performance")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "electrical_current")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "alarm")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sum(column: "_value")

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "alarm")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "alarm_highpr_pressostate" or r._field == "alarm_lowpr_pressostate" or r._field == "alarm_motor_breaker" or r._field == "alarm_low_flow_brine" or r._field == "alarm_low_temp_brine" or r._field == "alarm_3phase_order" or r._field == "alarm_overheating")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "alarm")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "alarm_outdoor_sensor" or r._field == "alarm_supply_sensor" or r._field == "alarm_return_sensor" or r._field == "alarm_hotwater_sensor" or r._field == "alarm_indoor_sensor")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "outdoor_temp")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "return_temp")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "indoor_temp")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "supply_temp" or r._field == "return_temp" or r._field == "supply_target_temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "brine_in_temp" or r._field == "brine_out_temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "outdoor_temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "hotwater_temp" or r._field == "hotwater_supply_temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "setting")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "hotwater_start_temp" or r._field == "hotwater_stop_temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pressurepipe_temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "indoor_temp" or r._field == "indoor_target_temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "runtime")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "runtime_compressor")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "runtime")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "runtime_3kw")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "runtime")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "runtime_6kw")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "runtime")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "runtime_hotwater")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "runtime")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "runtime_passive_cooling")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "runtime")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "runtime_active_cooling")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "compressor" or r._field == "brinepump" or r._field == "flowlinepump" or r._field == "hotwater_production" or r._field == "aux_heater_3kw" or r._field == "aux_heater_6kw")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "alarm")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "performance")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "electrical_current")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
